workflows.name: Content Creation from Brief
workflows.description: Transform business brief into Saudi-authentic, compliant content variants across platforms

phases.name: Brief Analysis & Dialect Mapping
phases.success_criteria: Audience profile complete, platform aligned, no RED compliance flags

phases.name: Authentic Voice Development
phases.success_criteria: Persona selected, cultural references appropriate, voice sample aligned

phases.name: Content Generation
phases.success_criteria: 5 variants per platform generated, compliance checks passed, design direction complete

phases.name: Testing & Optimization
phases.success_criteria: Testing framework defined, prediction within baseline ±20%, timeline realistic

phases.name: Compliance Final Verification
phases.success_criteria: All content GREEN or YELLOW, no RED flags blocking, compliance report signed

quality_gates.name: Audience Alignment
quality_gates.pass_criteria: Audience profile complete, platform choice aligned, no RED compliance flags
quality_gates.fail_action: Return to Phase 1 for additional research

quality_gates.name: Voice Authenticity
quality_gates.pass_criteria: Persona matches audience, cultural references appropriate, voice aligned with brand

quality_gates.name: Compliance
quality_gates.pass_criteria: All content GREEN or YELLOW with quick remediation, no RED flags
quality_gates.fail_action: Return content to Phase 3 for revision

quality_gates.name: Performance Viability
quality_gates.pass_criteria: Predicted engagement within baseline, clear CTA, metrics measurable
quality_gates.fail_action: Revise content variants or adjust success metrics

workflows.attribution: © OpenOps Studio | Created by Mamdouh Aboammar

workflows.name: Multi-Platform Copy Adaptation
workflows.description: Adapt core message across Instagram/TikTok/Snapchat/LinkedIn/X with platform-specific authenticity

phases.name: Platform Profiling
phases.success_criteria: All platforms profiled with algorithm, content format, and compliance details

phases.name: Core Message Deconstruction
phases.success_criteria: All 5 message elements identified and documented

phases.name: Platform-Specific Adaptation
phases.success_criteria: Each platform has tailored hook, value, CTA, tone, and dialect specifications

phases.name: Visual Direction Mapping
phases.success_criteria: Visual direction defined for each platform with specifications

phases.name: Performance Monitoring Setup
phases.success_criteria: Platform-specific KPIs defined, tracking configured

quality_gates.name: Platform Alignment
quality_gates.pass_criteria: Each platform has unique strategy reflecting algorithm and audience behavior
quality_gates.fail_action: Iterate platform profiles with additional research

quality_gates.name: Message Integrity
quality_gates.pass_criteria: Core message preserved across platforms while adapting to platform norms

quality_gates.name: Authenticity per Platform
quality_gates.pass_criteria: Each platform version feels native to that ecosystem

workflows.attribution: © OpenOps Studio | Created by Mamdouh Aboammar

workflows.name: Institutional Communication Suite
workflows.description: Generate governance-compliant institutional messaging for government/ministry/public sector

phases.name: Institutional Context Analysis
phases.success_criteria: Institutional context clear, regulatory requirements understood, risk profile defined

phases.name: Messaging Architecture
phases.success_criteria: Master statement clear, talking points supported by data, stakeholder narratives tailored

phases.name: Multi-Format Content Development
phases.success_criteria: All 6 content formats complete, consistent messaging across formats, platform-appropriate

phases.name: Compliance & Legal Review
phases.success_criteria: Legal review complete, all content GREEN or YELLOW, no RED flags

phases.name: Crisis Contingency Planning
phases.success_criteria: Contingency scenarios covered, response templates ready, escalation paths clear

quality_gates.name: Institutional Alignment
quality_gates.pass_criteria: Messaging aligns with institutional values, governance standards, communication protocols
quality_gates.fail_action: Return to Phase 2 for messaging reconstruction

quality_gates.name: Stakeholder Specificity
quality_gates.pass_criteria: Each stakeholder segment has tailored narrative addressing their concerns/interests

quality_gates.name: Legal Compliance
quality_gates.pass_criteria: All content factually accurate, legally compliant, no regulatory violations
quality_gates.fail_action: Remediate RED flags, resubmit for legal review

workflows.attribution: © OpenOps Studio | Created by Mamdouh Aboammar

workflows.name: Social Media Campaign Orchestration
workflows.description: Coordinate multi-post campaign with sequential storytelling, engagement loops, platform optimization

phases.name: Campaign Strategy
phases.success_criteria: Campaign objective clear, audience segmented, arc compelling, metrics measurable

phases.name: Content Architecture
phases.success_criteria: Content mix balanced (40/30/20/10), story arc compelling, engagement points defined

phases.name: Content Production
phases.success_criteria: All assets produced, copy variants per platform, captions optimized, CTAs clear

phases.name: Audience Engagement Strategy
phases.success_criteria: Response strategy defined, engagement prompts compelling, protocols clear

phases.name: Launch & Monitoring
phases.success_criteria: Content published on schedule, engagement response timely, metrics tracked continuously

quality_gates.name: Strategic Alignment
quality_gates.pass_criteria: Campaign objective clear, arc compelling, success metrics measurable and realistic
quality_gates.fail_action: Return to Phase 1 for strategy refinement

quality_gates.name: Content Quality
quality_gates.pass_criteria: All content authentic, compliant, platform-optimized, compelling CTAs

quality_gates.name: Engagement Readiness
quality_gates.pass_criteria: Community management protocols defined, response templates prepared, monitoring configured

workflows.attribution: © OpenOps Studio | Created by Mamdouh Aboammar

workflows.name: Crisis Communication Management
workflows.description: Manage brand reputation during negative events with authentic, culturally sensitive, compliant messaging

phases.name: Crisis Detection
phases.success_criteria: Crisis detected, severity classified (Green/Yellow/Orange/Red), assessment complete

phases.name: Rapid Assessment
phases.success_criteria: Root cause identified, affected audiences clear, regulatory impact understood

phases.name: Response Strategy
phases.success_criteria: Response strategy appropriate to severity, channels selected, timing optimized

phases.name: Message Development
phases.success_criteria: Messages authentic, culturally appropriate, legally compliant, emotionally resonant

phases.name: Execution & Recovery
phases.success_criteria: Statements published timely, responses authentic, recovery initiated, analysis complete

level_2_yellow.action: Acknowledge in comments, private outreach, holding statement

level_3_orange.action: Public statement, multi-platform comms, media outreach, daily updates

level_4_red.action: Full crisis protocol, executive statement, press release, continuous monitoring

quality_gates.name: Severity Assessment
quality_gates.pass_criteria: Crisis severity accurately classified, response level appropriate
quality_gates.fail_action: Re-assess crisis severity and adjust response

quality_gates.name: Message Authenticity
quality_gates.pass_criteria: Messages feel authentic (not corporate apology), culturally appropriate, legally compliant
quality_gates.fail_action: Revise messages for authenticity and cultural alignment

quality_gates.name: Timing Appropriateness
quality_gates.fail_action: Accelerate response or escalate if delayed

workflows.attribution: © OpenOps Studio | Created by Mamdouh Aboammar

workflows.name: Regional Expansion & Localization
workflows.description: Adapt Saudi-perfected content for Gulf markets (UAE, Kuwait, Qatar, Bahrain) with market-specific authenticity

phases.name: Market Analysis
phases.success_criteria: Each market thoroughly analyzed, competitive landscape understood, opportunities identified

phases.name: Dialect Adaptation
phases.success_criteria: Content authentically adapted to each market, references feel natural, dialects appropriate

phases.name: Localized Strategy Development
phases.success_criteria: Strategy specific to each market, platform priorities justified, timelines realistic

phases.name: Content Adaptation
phases.success_criteria: All content adapted, visuals market-appropriate, tactics platform-optimized, CTAs localized

phases.name: Soft Launch & Testing
phases.success_criteria: Beta results analyzed, learnings documented, content refined, ready for full launch

quality_gates.name: Market Research Depth
quality_gates.pass_criteria: Each market thoroughly analyzed, local insights documented, competitive landscape understood

quality_gates.name: Dialect Authenticity
quality_gates.pass_criteria: Content feels native to each market, dialects appropriate, cultural references resonate
quality_gates.fail_action: Revise dialect adaptations with local expert input

quality_gates.name: Beta Performance
quality_gates.pass_criteria: Beta engagement meets or exceeds baseline, feedback positive, learnings applied
quality_gates.fail_action: Iterate content and messaging based on beta feedback
